title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what challenges the people are facing and how they might be coping with them.

images.label: A
images.description: A person trying to assemble a very complex piece of flat-pack furniture with an instruction manual.

images.label: B
images.description: A public speaker standing on a stage behind a lectern, looking out at a huge audience.

images.label: C
images.description: A commuter trying to navigate a city street during a blizzard or very heavy snowstorm.

followUp.question: Which of these situations requires the most patience? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say why the people might have chosen these modes of transport and what the advantages/disadvantages are.

images.label: D
images.description: A person cycling along a quiet, sunny country road with panniers on their bike.

images.label: E
images.description: Passengers sitting in the luxurious first-class cabin of a long-haul flight.

images.label: F
images.description: A group of people taking a small ferry or boat to reach a remote island.

followUp.question: Which of these journeys would you find most appealing? (Why?)
